name: Rezdy
notes: Most consistent lifetime program for tour operators. Apply: https://www.rezdy.com/partners/

name: FareHarbor
notes: Operates as a Distribution Network — earn on individual bookings, not the software sub. Apply: https://fareharbor.com/distribution-network/

name: Checkfront
notes: 2026 terms shifted to high-ticket bounty for new operator signups, no recurring. Apply: https://www.checkfront.com/partners/

name: Peek Pro
notes: Paid monthly for life of account. Recently added AI retention tools. Apply: https://www.peek.com/pro/partners

name: Xola
notes: Explicitly offers 'lifetime commission' for attraction and tour memberships. Apply: https://www.xola.com/partners

name: SafetyWing
notes: Earns on every policy renewal for life of customer. Strong fit for tour operators promoting traveler insurance. Apply: https://safetywing.com/affiliates

name: Regiondo
notes: 20% on all monthly subscription fees for referred operators. EU-strong. Apply: https://pro.regiondo.com/partners/

name: Smartwaiver
notes: Sticky add-on — once integrated, operators rarely switch. Apply: https://www.smartwaiver.com/partners/

name: GoHighLevel
notes: Carried over from TravelOperator — VERIFY with GHL whether the same fp_ref code can be used for promoting from traveloperator.io or if a separate registration is required.

name: Bókun
notes: Primary competitor to Rezdy, owned by TripAdvisor. High-ticket bonuses for new PRO users. Apply: https://www.bokun.io/partners

name: WaiverForever
notes: Direct competitor to Smartwaiver. New 2026 partner track matches at 20% recurring. Apply: https://www.waiverforever.com/partners

name: Viator Travel Agent
notes: Not software — the largest tour marketplace operators list on. Per-booking commissions. Apply: https://www.viator.com/travelagents/
